synthesizedInsights.thesis: Synthesizing viewstats outlier research reveals a clear pattern: physics-based creature simulation content featuring baby/miniature creatures achieves extreme outlier scores (390x-677x subscriber-to-view ratios). The combination triggers two powerful engagement drivers: (1) protective response to 'baby' creatures creates emotional investment, and (2) physics simulation provides satisfying, loopable visual content. This outperforms even the strong '1000 Years' time compression format (24-26x). The 'ZOOCHOSIS' video (677x) proves the formula works with modded sandbox content, not just pure physics simulations. Recommendation: Immediate production of 'Baby AI Creature Physics Simulation' series testing this formula.

Each episode: (1) Showcase current collection, (2) Introduce new acquisition, (3) Show training/growth progress on existing creatures, (4) Tease next episode's new creature.
